name: BGMI
description: Battlegrounds Mobile India - 100 players parachute onto an island to fight for survival in this battle royale phenomenon.

roles.name: IGL (In-Game Leader)
roles.description: Makes rotation calls and strategic decisions

roles.name: Support
roles.description: Provides cover fire and utility support

maps.name: Erangel
tips: Hot drop Pochinki for early action and loot
School and Rozhok offer balanced risk-reward
Use compounds for cover during mid-game rotations
Bridge camping is risky but effective for zone control

maps.name: Miramar
tips: Hacienda and Pecado are high-tier loot zones
Use terrain elevation for positioning advantage
Vehicle rotations are essential due to map size
Avoid open desert areas during final circles
Always carry smoke grenades for revives and rotations
Land near vehicles for better mobility options
Use headphones for directional audio advantage
Practice recoil control in training mode daily

proStrategies.title: Loot Route Optimization
proStrategies.description: Plan efficient looting paths that maximize gear while minimizing zone pressure. Hit 3-4 compounds then rotate early to center circle.

proStrategies.title: Circle Play
proStrategies.description: Position on the edge of safe zone to catch rotating teams. Use natural cover and avoid being sandwiched between zone and enemies.

proStrategies.title: Compound Control
proStrategies.description: Secure a central compound in final circles. Use throwables to deny enemy pushes and maintain high ground advantage.
